explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: The Hess Sustainability Reports Page details opt-out mechanisms for targeted advertising and data sharing. This report also describes how cookies build user profiles for targeted advertising, relating to privacy in automated profiling and decision-making.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: The Hess Sustainability Reports Page provides evidence for the **privacy** pillar. This company-owned report details opt-out mechanisms for targeted advertising and data sharing, and describes how cookies build user profiles for targeted advertising, directly relating to privacy in automated profiling and decision-making by Hess and its partners.
relevant_sources.title: Hess Sustainability Reports Page

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Hess' Sustainability Reports Page details opt-out mechanisms for targeted advertising and data sharing, addressing the privacy pillar. These published materials document evidence for 1 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Drawing from 8 publicly available sources, the assessment found no qualifying public evidence for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
